simple-mcp._info: 69 tools. Wrapper runs source mode by default (native simple_mcp_server core-dumps on tools/call; set SIMPLE_MCP_PREFER_NATIVE=1 to opt in once fixed).

simple-lsp-mcp._info: LSP MCP tools. Wrapper runs source mode by default (native fails all tools/call; lsp_diagnostics gated off in source mode, 10/11 tools work). Set SIMPLE_LSP_MCP_PREFER_NATIVE=1 to opt in once fixed.

stitch._info: Google Stitch MCP — UI design generation, site building, screen code retrieval
args: if [ -f ~/.security/env.sh ]; then . ~/.security/env.sh; fi; exec npx -y @_davideast/stitch-mcp proxy
